zh.Prescot, Lancashire, England: 英國藍卡爾普雷斯可特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicola Haselwall於1259年出生在英國藍卡爾普雷斯可特時，她的父親Sir Patric de Hallowell44歲，母親Agnes de Thurstanton48歲。她於1279年與Sir John Norreys在英國藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世在英國藍卡爾斯培可。

zh-hans.Prescot, Lancashire, England: 英国藍卡爾普雷斯可特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicola Haselwall于1259年出生在英国藍卡爾普雷斯可特时，她的父亲Sir Patric de Hallowell44岁，母亲Agnes de Thurstanton48岁。她于1279年与Sir John Norreys在英国藍卡爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世在英国藍卡爾斯培可。

nameMeanings.name: Nicola
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Nicholas
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Nicola Haselwall was born in 1259, in Prescot, Lancashire, England, her father, Sir Patric de Hallowell, was 44 and her mother, Agnes de Thurstanton, was 48. She married Sir John Norreys in 1279, in Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died in Speke, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicola Haselwall est née en 1259, à Prescot, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Patric de Hallowell, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Thurstanton, avait 48 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Norreys en 1279, à Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée à Speke, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicola Haselwall 1259 in Prescot, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Patric de Hallowell 44 und ihre Mutter Agnes de Thurstanton 48. Sie hat 1279 in Lancashire, England Sir John Norreys geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb in Speke, Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicola Haselwall è nata il nel 1259 nel Prescot, Lancashire, England, sua padre, Sir Patric de Hallowell, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Agnes de Thurstanton, aveva 48 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Norreys nel 1279, nel Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel Speke, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicola Haselwallが1259年にイギリスランカシュアイアプレスコトで生まれた時，父Sir Patric de Hallowellは44歳，母Agnes de Thurstantonは48歳であった。1279年にイギリスランカシュアイアでSir John Norreysと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女はイギリスランカシュアイアスペクで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicola Haselwall(이)가 1259년 영국 랭카실르 프레스컷에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Patric de Hallowell(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes de Thurstanton(은)는 48세였다. 그녀는 1279년 영국 랭카실르에서 Sir John Norreys(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 랭카실르 스p크에서 사망했다.

mn.Speke, Lancashire, England, United Kingd: Speke, Lancashire, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicola Haselwall nasceu em 1259, em Prescot, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Patric de Hallowell, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Thurstanton, tinha 48 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Norreys em 1279, em Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em Speke, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicola Haselwall родилась в 1259 г. в местности прескот, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Patric de Hallowell было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Thurstanton, 48. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Norreys в 1279 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла в местности спек, ланкашир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nicola Haselwall nació en 1259, en Prescot, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Patric de Hallowell, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Agnes de Thurstanton, tenía 48 años. Se casó con Sir John Norreys en 1279, en Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en Speke, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
